---
title: "PhD Candidate in Distributed Machine Learning for Open RAN"
description: "Exciting opportunity at Trinity College Dublin!"
author: "Dinh Nguyen"
date: "2025-09-01"
image: phdposition2025.jpg
draft: false
categories:
  - position
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
comments:
  utterances: 
    repo: https://github.com/icclabo/icc
    label: phdposition2025
---

I am inviting applications for a fully funded PhD position in Distributed Machine Learning for Open RAN (start date: Spring 2026). This project will explore federated learning, reinforcement learning, and scalable AI frameworks for next-generation open mobile networks.

The position offers a €25K annual stipend, EU fees coverage for 4 years, and the chance to collaborate with both academic and industry leaders in AI and telecommunications. Please refer to the pdf file for more details.

<Intelligence, Computing & Communication Lab: Advancing an Interdisciplinary Program of Research

{{< pdf phdtcd.pdf width=600 height=400 image_width=600 image_border=1 image=firstslide.png >}}
>
